_comment: Zero-byte file. csv-parse tokenizes it to zero records, so parseWorkforceCsv()'s own `const [header] = records` destructure sees `header === undefined` and throws WorkforceCsvHeaderError('CSV file is empty; expected a header row') -- a file-level error, before any per-row processing.
call: parseWorkforceCsv(csvText, month) -- throws before importCsv's per-row loop is reached
